title: Floralcraft® 50cm x 20m Natural Kraft Paper Roll, Eco-Friendly Brown Paper for Arts & Craft, Gift Wrapping, Packing, Postal, Shippingl (20 metres Long, 70gsm)
features: High-Quality Material: Made from 70gsm natural kraft paper, offering durability and strength for various applications.
Versatile Use: Perfect for arts and crafts, gift wrapping, packing, shipping, floor covering, and parcel dunnage.
Eco-Friendly: Made from sustainable materials, making it an excellent choice for environmentally conscious consumers..
Generous Size: 50cm wide and 20 meters long, providing ample material for multiple projects.
Natural Brown Color: Adds a rustic and organic touch to your creative projects and packaging..
description: Discover the versatility and eco-friendliness of the Floralcraft 50cm x 20m Natural Kraft Paper Roll. Made from high-quality 70gsm kraft paper, this roll is perfect for a wide range of uses, from arts and crafts to gift wrapping, packing, shipping, and even floor covering. Its durable and robust nature ensures reliable performance, whether you're creating beautiful gift wraps or protecting items during shipping. This kraft paper is also an excellent choice for environmentally conscious consumers, as it is made from sustainable materials. Embrace creativity and sustainability with Floralcraft Natural Kraft Paper Roll.
